note: OWNER-RATIFIED deterministic lifecycle policy. This manifest is a CLAIM — the supervisor reconciles it against actual probed processes and receipt evidence; it never executes arbitrary manifest content (commands are pinned here, reviewed in git, covered by protected.sha256). Proposal paths cannot edit this file (protected class; see PROTECTED.md).

envelope.note: the pre-authorized envelope — every action the supervisor may EVER take; anything else is refused

gateway.note: the ONE external surface. Routes only declared interfaces; NEVER fronts AUMLOK (7094/7095) — routing must not become authority.

services.name: brain-door
services.note: Sam 2's canonical brain door — supervised as a DEPENDENCY probe only (external:true = never started/stopped by this supervisor); its Convex backend is its own lifecycle

services.name: voice-sidecar
services.note: optional: needs the one-time voice setup; absence is a labelled degraded state, not a boot failure

swap.note: probe-before-swap; the old process keeps serving until the candidate is verified; failed probe → candidate killed, old stays, rollback receipt
